basics.name: Riccardo Lincetto
basics.label: Computer Vision & Machine Learning Expert
basics.summary: Expert in computer vision (classical, neuromorphic), robotics, deep learning, LLM agents. Motivated by challenging problems, committed to continuous learning, highly organized. Experienced in both team and independent work. Available as contractor or consultant.

work.name: Freelancer
work.summary: Visual defect detection from image segmentation (data pipeline, model training); object detection for drone warehouse applications (data synthesis, training, on-device deployment, c++ inference post-processor); design and on-premise deployment of LLM-based RAG system.
highlights: Visual defect detection from image segmentation (data pipeline, model training)
Object detection for drone warehouse applications (data synthesis, training, on-device deployment, c++ inference post-processor)
Design and on-premise deployment of LLM-based RAG system

work.name: CGTrader
work.summary: Generative AI research for 3D models (text-to-3d, image-to-3d) and integration into cgdream.ai; early-stage BE design and build of cgdream.ai; at-scale image classification and aesthetics ranking projects; custom deployment process of ML models (containers, custom registry, API).
highlights: Led research on generative AI for 3D models (image-to-3d) over 9 months, beating state-of-the-art results by 10% on standard benchmarks by exploiting curated datasets from company assets
Designed a text-to-image platform (https://cgdream.ai) from scratch, built a backend and launched in 3 months using scalable microservices architecture
Increased revenue by 100k+ USD over 6 months by training a 3D model scoring system for affecting the results ranking of cgtrader.com
Assisted the design of, built in 3 months and maintained a custom MLOps platform for a team of 5+ ML engineers

work.name: Sportradar
work.summary: Research on neural style transfer, from simulation to reality, and tests on data augmentation.

work.name: Dronus
work.summary: Research and prototyping of computer vision and learning-based algorithms for drones navigation and applications. Work on optical flow and object detection on resource constrained settings. Sensors research for system design. Mechanical parts control on Arduino.
highlights: Research and prototyping of computer vision and learning-based algorithms for drones navigation
Optical flow and object detection on resource constrained settings

work.name: Akka
work.summary: Functional owning (concept design and testing) of a fleet management service, namely driving efficiency report, for a big car manufacturing company.
highlights: Concept design and testing of fleet management service
Driving efficiency report for car manufacturing company

work.name: Sony
work.summary: Internship and Master Thesis on multispectral data acquisition with event-based cameras. Use of events obtained from a spectral filter tuning to reconstruct the spectrum of the scene. Sensor tests and benchmark evaluation with simple reconstruction methods.
highlights: Master Thesis on multispectral data acquisition with event-based cameras
Spectral filter tuning for scene spectrum reconstruction
